start.speaker: Pliable
start.text: Mud to my knees, cold in my bones, and no city in sight. If this is the beginning of your promise, you may keep the rest. I am going home.

choices.text: Do not turn back at the first wound. The gate is still ahead.
Then go. I grieve for you, but I cannot repent in your place.

gone.text: Pliable scrambles back toward the city, choosing familiar ground over promised grace. The fog swallows him, and you are alone in the swamp.
